categories.label: Calendar
categories.description: Per-user access to one's own and shared calendars.

permissions.label: Use calendar
permissions.description: Read your own and shared calendars, subscribe to feeds, and respond to invitations.

permissions.label: Edit events
permissions.description: Create, update and delete events in your own and write-shared calendars.

permissions.label: Share & publish
permissions.description: Create extra calendars, manage sharing, app passwords and public feeds.

permissions.label: Invite externals
permissions.description: Invite people outside this server by email (requires send-mail too).

permissions.label: Delegate access
permissions.description: Act on a calendar delegated to you by another user.

permissions.label: Administer calendars
permissions.description: Manage other users' calendars and instance resources (rooms, equipment), and read audit trails.
